[2026-03-18 12:35] NEW TASK — Audit the existing polyphony-dev team config against framework standards.

Read these files:
- Roster: `/c/Users/mihkel.putrinsh/Documents/github/.mmp/polyphony/.claude/teams/polyphony-dev.json`
- Common prompt: `/c/Users/mihkel.putrinsh/Documents/github/.mmp/polyphony/.claude/teams/common-prompt.md`
- Brainstorm: `/c/Users/mihkel.putrinsh/Documents/github/.mmp/polyphony/.claude/teams/brainstorm.md`

Then compare against our framework topics:
- T01 (team taxonomy) — does this team fit an archetype?
- T03 (communication) — are protocols formalized?
- T04 (governance) — is authority structure clear?
- T06 (lifecycle) — is startup/shutdown robust?
- T07 (safety) — are permission boundaries defined?

**Output:** Gap analysis — what the existing config has vs what our framework requires. Structured as: existing strength → gap → recommendation. Report to me.
